case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ELIEZER YLAGAN

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-16-2020 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ELIEZER YLAGAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
